nasb.text: And they all continued in amazement and great perplexity, saying to one another, “What does this mean?”

esv.text: And all were amazed and perplexed, saying to one another, “What does this mean?”

cnv.text: 眾人還在驚訝迷惘的時候，彼此說：“這是甚麼意思？”

ccb.text: 他们都大感惊奇和困惑，彼此议论说：“这到底是怎么回事？”

csbs.text: 众人又惊讶又困惑，彼此问：“这是什么意思呢？”
